visuals.title: High-Availability Web Architecture on AWS
visuals.description: Visual diagram for High-Availability Web Architecture on AWS
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Public Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, GCP</text>
  
  <!-- AWS Platform -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    AWS
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Azure Platform -->
  <rect x="160" y="70" width="100" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Azure
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- GCP Platform -->
  <rect x="270" y="70" width="100" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    GCP
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connecting Line -->
  <line x1="150" y1="130" x2="270" y2="130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Cloud Services -->
  <rect x="110" y="160" width="200" height="120" fill="white" rx="8" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Cloud Services
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Service Items -->
  <text x="210" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Compute, Storage, Networking
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Databases, Analytics
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Machine Learning, IoT
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Security, Management
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows from platforms to services -->
  <line x1="100" y1="130" x2="150" y2="160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="130" x2="210" y2="160" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="320" y1="130" x2="270" y2="160" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
